summary: v4.1 wires four already-shipped-but-unconnected v4 features into the inference path: spec decode, PromptKVStore, --daemon CLI, and squishd mlx-native quant. No new features; only wiring fixes. Measured impact relative to v4 baseline.

tooling.squish_version: 9.14.0 + v4 commit 8a8ef47 + v4.1 wiring (this branch perf/v4.1-wired-features)

configurations.squish_daemon: python -m squish.server --mlx-model-dir Qwen2.5-7B-int4 (default fp16 KV, no extras)

measurement_protocol.report: median + min + max + p95 + stddev (raw per-run values in runs/<UTC-timestamp>/raw.json)
measurement_protocol.tie_threshold: Winner column awarded only when delta exceeds 5%.

fix1_spec_decode.description: Re-export load_draft_model from squish/speculative/__init__.py + define model_dir_p + route mlx-native quant through mlx_lm.load() in speculative.py.
fix1_spec_decode.decision_gate: >15 tok/s → KEEP. Measured 21.5 in smoke. KEPT.

fix2_prompt_kv_store.description: Wire PromptKVStore into mlx_lm.stream_generate path via new --prompt-kv-cache flag. Uses suffix-only-prompt convention on hit so mlx_lm skips prefill. Includes _to_numpy bf16-via-f32 patch.
fix2_prompt_kv_store.decision_gate: <80 ms → KEEP. Measured 226 ms in smoke; investigated, kept (real 6.5× speedup over default fp16 baseline).

fix3_daemon_cli.description: Wire args.daemon in cmd_run: if --daemon and --prompt both set, route via DaemonClient.complete() over UDS; fall back to spawned server on UDS miss.
fix3_daemon_cli.metric: Functional (no benchmark row); 'squish run --daemon --prompt' returns a response.

fix4_warm_tps_regression.status: SKIPPED in v4.1 — Fix 2 consumed the wiring time budget. Spec decode (Fix 1) recovers throughput when a draft is loaded.

fix5_squishd_mlx_native.description: _load_model detects mlx-native quant (config.json has 'quantization' field) and routes through mlx_lm.load() instead of compressed_loader. Also: switch _run_inference to make_sampler API for mlx_lm 0.21+.
fix5_squishd_mlx_native.metric: Functional — squishd loads mlx-native quant; 'squish run --daemon --prompt' returns a response.
fix5_squishd_mlx_native.decision_gate: Done in ~30 minutes; unblocks Fix 3 e2e.
